text: On the financial front, NVIDIA scheduled its fourth-quarter and fiscal year 2026 earnings conference call for February 25, 2026, with the fiscal year ending January 25, 2026 [679c2f95-b7a5-4235-b904-6b3b22ea121c]. Based on available calculation data, Q4 FY2026 revenue reached $68.127 billion with a net margin of 63.06% [0e671c19-4b44-47a7-9234-5d3634f7be27, 01915efa-aaa7-42eb-b9e2-9b56d3881324]. The stock has demonstrated strong performance with a 1-year price return of 48.48%, significantly outperforming the S&P 500's 15.04% return over the same period [e2b73cf5-3c6d-4457-8b25-515a7e8f9880, 4e7134c1-290f-4b49-bb42-eed50a873427].
